title: Mark Elliott
compiled_truth: Mark Elliott is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-12-16 to 2001-11-16), Mark Elliott sent 44 and received 184 emails, totalling 228 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (21), [Michael Brown](people/michael-brown) (11), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (11), [Jeffrey Hodge](people/jeffrey-hodge) (9), [Richard Sanders](people/richard-sanders) (9).
